sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73844" key="o(mosu/zuc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμο-σύζυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73844.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bound together,</tr_> neut. pl. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὁμοσύζῠγα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:2:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.36</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
